short_summary:
Daniel Philip Meuser ( MEW-zər; born February 10, 1964) is an American businessman and politician serving as the U.S. representative for Pennsylvania's 9th congressional district since 2019. A Republican, he previously served as the secretary of revenue in the cabinet of Pennsylvania governor Tom Corbett. He was previously president of the Pride Corporation, a manufacturer of motorized wheelchairs in the Wilkes-Barre/Scranton metro area of Pennsylvania, and currently serves the company as a board member and consultant. 
On January 6, 2021, Meuser was among the 147 Republican members of Congress who voted against the certification of the results of the 2020 United States presidential election.
birth_place: New York City, New York, U.S.

education.institution: State University of New York, Maritime College (attended)
